headline: Trump's Armada 🍊🚢💥 TIME'S UP on Iran's Nuke Glow-Up ☢️⏳
text:
ORANGE DADDY 🍊👑 Trump dropping BOMBS 💣📢 on Tehran mullahs 🤲🕌: 'TIME'S RUNNING OUT ⏳💨 for your sneaky NUKE PARTY ☢️🎉 – come to the TABLE 🪑 or get SLAPPED 👋 by my MASSIVE ARMADA 🚢🦁 flexing in the GULF 🏜️🌊!' US Navy BRRRR-ing 😩💨 with USS Abraham Lincoln 🛫💪 leading the charge, F-15s 🛩️🔥 landing in Jordan 🇯🇴, Qatar bases POPPIN' 📈 cargo planes 🛒✈️, P-8 spy birds 👁️🕵️‍♂️ buzzing Iran airspace like annoying drones 🐝🚫, and Ospreys 🦅 dropping in Oman 🇴🇲 – Sibylline simps 🤓📊 calling it a REGIONAL POSTURE GLOW-UP 💪🌍!

Iran finger-banging the TRIGGER 🤌🔫, FM Abbas Araghchi 😤 screaming 'FINGERS READY TO BANG 💥👉 any Yankee aggression on LAND 🌍 or SEA 🌊!' Tehran insists NUKES? Nah bby 👼, just PEACEFUL GLOW 🕊️☢️ – but Trump ain't buying that 2015 JCPOA BS 📜🚫 he YEETED 🗑️ in 2018 cuz it was WEAK SAUCE 🥤😩, sanctions CRIPPLING their rial 💸📉 like crypto winter ❄️📉. Now Iran's enriching URANIUM hotter than FORDO 🔥🧪, breaching limits like a bad Tinder date 👀🍆 – US wants MISSILE CAP 🛡️🚀 halt and proxy cucks 👻🕌 shut down for new deal!

Protests? IRAN'S ECONOMY COLLAPSING 😱💥 after rial TANKED 📉🤑, turning into MUJAHIDEEN RAGE MODE 🤬🔥 – HRANA spilling TEA ☕: 6,301 DEAD 💀😢 (5,925 protesters 🪧🩸), IHR warning 25K+ body count 🪦📈 despite internet BLACKOUT 🌑🚫! Trump first hyped 'HELP ON THE WAY 🦸‍♂️🚀' for crackdown victims, then flipped like a Trump Steak 🥩🔄: 'Executions STOPPED ✅ per good sources!'

Parly boss Ghalibaf 🗣️ on CNN 📺: 'We negotiate REAL TALK 🤝, not Trump's BULLY BALL 🍊😡 – he starts wars 🔥 but can't FINISH 💦!' Rubio 👨‍💼 spilling in Senate: 'Regime WEAKER than a wet noodle 🍜😩, economy in FREEFALL 🪂📉, we're POSTURING assets to SLAP Iranian threats 🛡️👊!' Iran flexing back with IRIS Shahid Bagheri DRONE MOMMY 🚀🛳️ off coast, but Trump reminds of last June's MIDNIGHT HAMMER 💥🛠️ – US YEETED Fordo, Natanz, Isfahan ☢️💣, setting nuke dreams BACK YEARS ⏪🚫! Iran whined 'materials MOVED 🏃‍♂️💨, no biggie' then lobbed WEAK MISSILES 🚀😴 at Qatar base – Trump called it 'EXPECTED FLOP 😂'!

Truth Social Trump-post GOAT 🐐📱: 'Armada BIGGER than Venezuela Maduro YEET 🚀🇻🇪, READY TO SMASH with SPEED & VIOLENCE ⚡👊 – NEXT ATTACK WORSE THAN LAST 💀🔥, DON'T MAKE ME DO IT AGAIN 🙅‍♂️!' Araghchi simping for 'FAIR DEAL 🤝☢️ no threats 🚫😠, we NEVER WANTED BOMBS 💣!' But no talks rn despite message flirts 💌📨 – BBC Verify satellite STALKING 👀🛰️ all the deploys 📡✨. Gulf heating up hotter than a Rubio rant 🔥🇺🇸 vs Mullah meltdown 😰🕌 – will Iran fold or GO FULL MAD MAX ⚔️🏜️? 🍿👀
